product_overview: PathMind AI is a personalized learning platform that generates a custom curriculum graph for a user’s chosen topic, then guides them through topic-by-topic learning with curated resources and progress tracking. Users can review past learning paths, explore node resources, answer evaluation questions, and unlock new topics as they complete prerequisites.
core_goals: Create a new personalized learning path from a learning goal
Review learning paths and resume an existing path
Open topic resources and study curated learning materials
Answer topic questions to check understanding
Mark topics complete to unlock dependent topics

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Users can sign up or sign in with email and password to access their personalized learning experience.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Toggle between sign up and sign in views -> Enter email and password -> Submit authentication form -> See the main learning interface

features.name: Sidebar and Path History
features.description: Authenticated users can view their existing learning paths and start a new learning path from the sidebar.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> See the list of existing learning paths -> Select a learning path -> See the corresponding curriculum graph and path details
Navigate to / -> Open the new path flow -> Enter a learning goal -> Submit the goal -> See a new learning path initialize

features.name: Path Graph Canvas
features.description: Users can explore their curriculum as an interactive graph of topics and prerequisites.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Open a learning path -> View the curriculum graph -> Pan and zoom around the canvas -> Select a topic node -> See the selected node details
Navigate to / -> Open a learning path -> View the curriculum graph -> Observe locked, available, and completed topics -> Follow prerequisite connections to understand the learning order

features.name: Node Resource Generation and Viewing
features.description: Users can view curated resources for a topic and generate them when they are not yet available.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Open a learning path -> Select a pending topic node -> Generate resources for the topic -> See curated resources and related questions
Navigate to / -> Open a learning path -> Select a topic node with cached resources -> View the resource list -> Open an external resource link

features.name: Question Answering
features.description: Users can answer evaluation questions for a learning node and see whether their response passes or fails.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Open a learning path -> Select a topic with an evaluation question -> Enter an answer -> Submit the answer -> See pass or fail feedback

Navigate to / -> Open a learning path -> Select a topic with an evaluation question -> Enter an incomplete or incorrect answer -> Submit the answer -> See evaluation feedback indicating the answer did not pass

features.name: Mark Node Complete
features.description: Users can mark a learning node as complete to unlock dependent topics in the path.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Open a learning path -> Select an available topic node -> Mark the topic as complete -> See the graph update with newly unlocked downstream topics

routes.description: Main application page handling auth gate and dashboard conditionally.

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Login and Registration using Supabase Auth
user_interactions: Click Sign Up or Sign In button
Toggle between Sign In and Sign Up views

features.name: Sidebar and Path History
features.description: View and select existing learning paths, or initiate creating a new path.
user_interactions: Click a path to select it
Enter learning goal in modal and submit

features.name: Path Graph Canvas
features.description: Interactive visualization of the learning curriculum topics and prerequisites using ReactFlow.
user_interactions: Click a node to view details

features.name: Node Resource Generation and Viewing
features.description: View resources for a selected topic, or generate them if not yet available.
user_interactions: Click "Generate Resources" if node is pending
View list of resources and questions

features.name: Question Answering
features.description: Answer evaluation questions associated with a learning node.

features.name: Mark Node Complete
features.description: Mark a learning node as complete to unlock subsequent dependent nodes.
